baseline.observed: runImprove kept the prior recommendation visible until the new request completed, so a retry for the same prompt or a failed request could leave stale recommendation output on screen.

red_test.result: FAILED before implementation because improvementRequestStarted was not exported.

change.summary: Added improvementRequestStarted and used it at the start of runImprove to clear stale recommendation output while tracking request ownership.

verification.result: PASS: 10 Node UI helper tests passed.
PASS: 10 quiet UI helper tests, Vite build, 32 library tests, 13 CLI tests, and strict clippy passed.

safety_controls: No new npm dependency was added.
The selected prompt id still owns the in-flight improvement result.
Existing recommendation ownership tests still pass.
